title: HReactor
description: Optimized modpack, just an optimized modpack... Yep.
body:
HReactor
 
A high-performance optimized modpack tailored for low-spec devices, drastically boost frame rates, cut down stutters and deliver steady smooth gameplay.
 
Core Features
 
- In-depth rendering optimization, greatly improved and stable frame rate
- Cut down resource consumption, relieve stutter and frame drop
- Optimized memory scheduling, lower crash risks
- Pure original game experience with no extra content changes
- Support single and multiplayer, easy setup for instant use
 
Optimization Description
 
Finely adjusted with classic optimization mods, optimized rendering and loading mechanisms. Solve slow chunk loading and complex scene lag problems, works smoothly on laptops and ordinary computers. It can run perfectly on mobile devices like phones and tablets, just think carefully if you attempt to run it on smart watches.
